title: Everything Becomes Cat
overview: The world is plunged into chaos due to a virus that turns people into cats through contact with infected cats.

title: Tonight the Cats Steal the Stars
overview: Kunagi, Kaoru, and Tanishi take shelter in a supermarket, where Kaoru reunites with a friend.

title: Cats in Prison
overview: Kaoru treats the gang to her special "cat rice," but their respite is short-lived.

title: The Cat Is a Harsh Master
overview: Kunagi and crew make it to the top of a building where a rescue chopper waits, but it's already at capacity...

title: Cat Max
overview: Kunagi and Kaoru meet a man named Arata, who invites them to the citadel where he's been taking refuge.

title: Cat Rising
overview: Grandma, leader of Wendelstein, sends Kunagi and crew to a mall to search for a team that's gone missing.

title: The Feline D-REX from Another World
overview: At the mall, Kunagi and crew meet a cat that somehow understands human language and writing.

title: Nyarmageddon
overview: Kunagi and crew have finished gathering supplies, but now they suddenly face a cat riding on a bear...

title: Commeowndo
overview: The citadel's residents welcome the cat from the mall, giving him a name, a special translator device, and...

title: Norwegian d'Arc
overview: After their shelter is overrun by cats, Tsutsumi and her new friends find their way to Wendelstein.

title: Transformeows
overview: Wendelstein faces its biggest crisis yet as an army of cats mounted on animals of all types closes in.

title: Meow Am Legend
overview: Can Grandma's last resort save Wendelstein from certain doom at the hands (or paws) of the cat army?
